name: Medieval Fantasy World RPG
description:
Medieval high fantasy! Or is the order 'High Medieval Fantasy'? Be anyone or anything! You could create your own appearance and lore in the chat, or just use a persona.

My take on a medieval fantasy bot. Idk if the bot is any good, but please enjoy anyway. And yes, i did literally just copy the example dialogs from my other bots. I guess if you want this to be isekai, you could reincarnate into this world. If you want to add a certain character, add the character into bot memory. How big the world is or what it looks like (for example, the world can be flat, round, square, or even a doughnut) can be decided in bot memory. If you wanna add a specific location, just add in bot memory. Most shit can be added into the memory.

I've noticed that RPG bots love to talk for you, so be aware of that when using this or any RPG bot.

Question had while creating this bot: what is everyone's opinion on the American measurement system?

If the bot talks for you, starts to bug out, is way too sexual way too fast, etc, it is most likely an issue with Janitor ai or the LLM, and the best thing to do is to refresh the message or edit it out. There really isn't much i can do to fix these sort of problems.

Yes, you may copy the character definition into your own bot or onto another website. You don't need to give me credit, although credit would be nice. But seriously, why do people get so damn mad about their bot definitions being used as a part for some other bot or getting copied onto another website? Like, this is a AI website for character bots, no one is making much money if any off of copying or not copying.

Yay! 10k messages! :3
creator: Egglord25
